techniques.evidence_quote: AccessKey has not been rotated for over 2 years!
Two AWS keys exposed... Key obtained (timing unknown)
One of the AWS Keys used for initial reconnaissance
suspicious reconnaissance actions, such as: ListBuckets, GetCallerIdentity
Impact – Shared AMIs publicly for exfil... Removal of all public AMIs created by threat actor

attack_chain.description: AWS access keys were accidentally exposed when a developer merged a company git repository into a personal public repository, leaking two AWS access keys. The keys had not been rotated for over 2 years.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Developer accidentally merges company git repo to personal one (public). Two AWS keys exposed. AccessKey has not been rotated for over 2 years!

attack_chain.description: The threat actor obtained one of the exposed AWS access keys and used it to authenticate to the AWS environment. The root cause of how the key was obtained remains unknown due to insufficient log retention.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Key obtained (timing unknown). One of the AWS Keys used for initial reconnaissance. Insufficient log retention for root cause analysis

attack_chain.description: The attacker used the compromised access key to perform reconnaissance of the AWS environment, including actions such as ListBuckets and GetCallerIdentity to enumerate cloud resources and confirm identity.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: One of the AWS Keys used for initial reconnaissance... suspicious reconnaissance actions, such as: ListBuckets, GetCallerIdentity

attack_chain.description: The attacker made AMIs (Amazon Machine Images) public to exfiltrate data. Multiple public AMIs were created and shared by the threat actor, enabling data exfiltration via publicly accessible cloud resources.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Impact – Shared AMIs publicly for exfil... Removal of all public AMIs created by threat actor. Investigation of content in shared AMIs

initial_access_vector: AWS access keys leaked via accidental public exposure of a company Git repository merged into a developer's personal public GitHub repo; keys were over 2 years old and unrotated
persistence_mechanism: None identified in the source text
privilege_escalation: None identified in the source text
